task: Seller Camera original professional control console and horizontal ruler

design_system.background: dark translucent console with subtle material, stroke, and shadow
design_system.accent: Seller Camera teal-green for active state, value badge, and center pointer
design_system.typography: monospaced digits for parameter values and ruler labels
design_system.icon_language: original SwiftUI-drawn parameter glyphs built from primitive shapes

components.replaced_expanded_console: Expanded control area now shows one active horizontal ruler instead of five simultaneous compact vertical wheels

interaction.active_parameter_switch: Switches visible ruler only; does not dispatch runtime writes
interaction.ruler_drag: Horizontal drag dispatches existing onWheelStep callback with bounded step count
interaction.snap_behavior: UI recenters to selected tick after drag using existing selected/pending value mapping
interaction.lock_behavior: LOCK is displayed as disabled and does not trigger writes

contract_protection.shutter: unchanged; ISO manual keeps Shutter LOCK
contract_protection.focus: not returned to bottom parameter bar

validation.notes: Build passed. True-device interaction and visual polish still require manual device validation.

risks: Horizontal ruler hand feel is not yet validated on device.
Small-screen density for ruler labels and value badge needs screenshot review.
WB/TINT/Shutter long tick lists may need further visual sampling after device testing.
next_recommended_package: Device UI validation and small-screen polish for the horizontal five-parameter console before Focus UI preflight.
